biography:
The Strip District’s only free weight gym
 📍 Pittsburgh | The Stacks at 3 Crossings
Open 24/7 💪 Get in. Get out. Get fit.
 Join today ↓

top_videos.text:
Pittsburgh! We’re back at Stacks Fitness tomorrow night for Silent Buti Yoga 🎧✨

Dance, move, sweat, and get out of your head for an hour.

💜 Pay what you can
📍 Stacks Fitness - every Tuesday 
⏰ 7 PM

Bring a mat and a friend.

#Pittsbur
top_videos.author: dropsoundeventspg

top_videos.text:
Every Tuesday night is about to become your favorite summer tradition. ☀️🎧

Join us at Stacks Fitness for DropSound — a unique fitness experience combining movement, music, and community. Whether you’re a regular or trying your first class
top_videos.author: dropsoundeventspg

top_videos.text:
Kaylee is BACK in June 🔥

tonight was hot, emotional, and electric
we moved, we danced, we felt everything
the lights, the music, the energy… unreal at Stacks Fitness ✨

Dropsound is not your typical yoga class
it’s an experience — you fee
top_videos.author: dropsoundeventspg
